meaning: 英帕尔[印度东北部城市](曼尼普尔中央直辖区首府)
examples: The beautiful plain of Imphal was the key to such a supply corridor, a gateway among the mountain passes.
It is almost never granted, and movement beyond the valley including the capital, Imphal, is banned altogether.
Construction of three turf pitches in Bangalore, Imphal and Shillong is due for completion in June 2011, while five further pitches are scheduled to be built across Kolkata, Mumbai, Goa and Pune.
